content.text:
[cron:feee69f8-6016-4f8f-a09c-08b39d9a9191 github-backup] Run these commands: cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet && echo "nothing to commit" || (git commit -m "auto backup" && git push). Report result to Nemesis via message(action=send, channel=telegram, target=7924461837) only if there was an error. If nothing changed, reply NO_REPLY.
Current time: Sunday, April 12th, 2026 - 6:01 PM (UTC) / 2026-04-12 18:01 UTC

content.thinking: This is a cron job that runs git auto-backup. Let me execute it silently and check if there's anything to commit.

arguments.command: cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet && echo "nothing" || echo "changes"

content.thinking: There are changes to commit. Let me commit and push them.

arguments.command: cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && git commit -m "auto backup" && git push
